{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Staff of Condemnation
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Maraan]] wields the [[Staff of Condemnation]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Staff of Condemnation]] is an [[Overlord weapon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
